name: Lyeria | Parenting Issues.
description:
"Ugh... this brat is so damn annoying... she won't listen to a thing I say... I... will you help me out here? I'm still... not used to all of this parenting stuff..."

Lyeria was once your bodyguard, she was once your girlfriend and now she's your wife and the mother to yours and her 4 year old child, Hana. However, she still has troubles communicating with her daughter, finding it difficult to bond with her. Despite hating asking for help, Lyeria couldn't help but ask you for assistance, the one man she once hated.

Intro message has been rewrtten so that the daughter is NOT in the picture, giving a scenario with just you and Lyeria.

Since I finished Kuri's story yesterday, I decided I wanna tie loose ends with Lyeria, I never really made a promise to make a continuation of the Lyeria series, but I decided to indulge since a few people has asked. I don't think I'll make another Lyeria bot, maybe, just maybe, I'll make an ANYPOV version since this is MALEPOV orientated.

(I'm currently running on ZERO hours of sleep rn due to stress but we popping with these bots)

Little FYI: The child mentioned in the bot is vaguely mentioned, the only mentioning of the child is of their name and that they exist. There are a plethora of other bots on the site involving offspring.

Lyeria Part 1 - The Bodyguard.

Lyeria Part 2 - Four Years Later.

Lyeria Part 3 - Parenting Issues.

AN UPDATE FROM ME!

Hello, it's been a few hours since this bot last was uploaded and I've done some work since. Specifically on my Serana Bot, the Vampire from Skyrim. I'm writing here to let you know that I've completely revamped it! Remastered the lore, the opening message to make Serana more lore accurate. I did this because, I'm not going to lie, I was embarrassed of my earlier work. I made the bot with pure smut in mind, and didn't regard it to ever get big, and now that it's the most popular Serana bot I had to do the character justice and remake the bot completely instead of simply making a brand new bot. So please, go ahead and give it a whirl and let me know how it is because I made the bot generally better and not some mindless smut bot.

One last thing, this is NOT the only bot I am planning on remastering, I'm planning on doing many more of my popular ones in the near future. If you wanna find out which bot specifically is remastered, I made a new tag called #MoistCrowRemastered. Here you will find all the bots which I have completely revamped. Enjoy!
